text: implement several options for the watchdog options modal (buttons and key shortcuts when open)
description:
opened with ctrl+space when watchdog panel open. 
options in the pannel (buttons + key shortcuts)
- w: closes watchdog panel
- r: reloads 
- c: connects
- s: switches focus from one xterm.js to the other xterm.js
- d: disable watchdog
- a: activate watchdog
